hero-section.label: Welcome to
hero-section.title: Digital Platform {highlight}
hero-section.description: Biteo - The comprehensive digital ecosystem for the beauty and wellness industry. Connect salons, hairstylists, and customers in a unified platform.

about-section.label: About Biteo
about-section.title: Where Technology Meets Beauty Art
about-section.description: Biteo is a comprehensive digital platform for the beauty and wellness industry. We connect professional salons, hairstylists, and customers in a modern digital ecosystem, making management and booking easier than ever.
about-section.storyText: Founded with the mission to digitize Vietnam's beauty industry, Biteo was born from a passion for technology and the desire to provide the best experience for both salon owners and customers. Every feature is designed to simplify business operations and enhance service experiences.

whyUs.title: Easy to Use
whyUs.text: Intuitive interface, easy to learn, suitable for all users.

whyUs.title: High Efficiency
whyUs.text: Automate management processes, saving time and operational costs.

whyUs.title: Secure & Safe
whyUs.text: Data is protected with high-level security standards.

whyUs.title: Community Connection
whyUs.text: Build connected salon and customer community, reliable.

services-section.label: Services
services-section.title: Comprehensive Solutions
services-section.subtitle: Biteo provides complete tools to manage and grow your beauty business.
